runtime_proof.row_counts_note: Live table row counts queried directly against the zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm Supabase project via SELECT COUNT(*) immediately after the pnpm test:db run above (which cleans up its own inserted rows via explicit deletes -- these counts reflect steady-state live data, not test artifacts). This diff's scope (governance config/docs + TypeScript ops-orchestration tooling) does not itself touch any of these tables; this runtime proof exists because T1 tier requires it unconditionally per truth-check-lib.ts's runtime_proof_required gate (tier === 'T1'), independent of whether the diff's own files touch DB code.

status: MERGED -- PR #1216 merged to main at merge SHA 8ca5acf38a31fc1492961a0951a6af10029bc6c0. This bundle now includes real live-DB runtime proof, added post-merge to satisfy the unconditional T1 runtime_proof_required gate.

continuation.reason: PM verdict CHANGES_REQUIRED on the prior replacement PR: GitHub reported that PR's merge-visible diff as 60 changed files (not the intended 20), because its branch ancestry (built via `git branch` from an already-accepted head, plus two later `git merge origin/main` passes) had accumulated individual commits from unrelated, already-shipped lanes as ancestors -- each surfacing its own files in the PR-vs-main comparison and each carrying its own native issue-ID text into commit messages (also breaking Branch Discipline Guard for reasons beyond this agent's unilateral authority to fix without a history rewrite).
continuation.resolution: This branch was created directly from `origin/main` via `git worktree add -b claude/utv2-1533-concurrency-ramp-clean origin/main` -- no merge, no cherry-pick of merge commits, no ancestry relationship to the prior PRs at all. Only the intended implementation content for 14 declared paths was carried over (copied file-by-file from the prior branch's accepted tree, then committed fresh). A verification confirmed origin/main had not independently touched any of those 14 paths since UTV2-1533 began (see verified_source_sha below), so the carried content is byte-identical to the accepted implementation with zero reconciliation needed.
continuation.superseded_prs_note: Recorded here as provenance only -- their SHAs are never used as verified_source_sha, proof_bundle_base_sha, or any validator binding for this lane. Both remain open until this clean PR is independently proven healthy, then will be closed as superseded.

targeted_tests.command: npx tsx --test scripts/ops/concurrency-simulation.test.ts scripts/ops/shared.test.ts scripts/ops/lane-start.test.ts scripts/ops/lane-maximizer.test.ts scripts/codex-dispatch.test.ts

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

sha_binding.pre_utv2_1533_main_baseline_note: origin/main's tip immediately before UTV2-1533's first commit. Used to prove origin/main never independently touched any of the 14 intended implementation paths: `git diff --stat 9e630fe9..40782f85 -- <14 paths>` (40782f85 = origin/main's tip at the moment this clean branch was created) produced zero output.
sha_binding.verified_source_note: This clean branch's own substantive implementation commit (post-rebase onto origin/main's tip after UTV2-1499 landed) -- the 14 files carried in verbatim from the accepted implementation, byte-identical, zero reconciliation. An ancestor of the PR's actual live head at every point checked.
sha_binding.verification_target_fix_note: The lane-maximizer P2 fix commit (explicit verification_target contract, replacing the issue_id-guessing default) -- new work on this clean branch, not carried from any prior PR.
sha_binding.accepted_pr_head_sha_prior_lineage_note: PR #1213's accepted head, from which the 14 files' content was sourced (via the working tree of the branch built on top of it). Provenance only -- not an ancestor of this clean branch and not used as any current binding.
sha_binding.merge_sha_note: PR #1216 merged via pnpm ops:merge-wrapper pr-merge (squash, auto-merge armed, no --admin) at 2026-07-14T22:58:29Z. This is a real, permanent, immutable historical fact once merged -- unlike proof_bundle_base_sha (an open PR's head, which changes on every push), a merge SHA cannot become stale after the fact, so it is safe to record here.
sha_binding.proof_bundle_base_note: The commit this proof bundle document was authored against (its own parent) -- NOT a claim about the PR's current live head. A field inside a commit can never truthfully claim to equal the PR's current head: the act of committing that claim immediately produces a new commit, making the claim false again the instant it's recorded. This repo removed an equivalent current_pr_head_sha field from this schema for exactly that reason (see docs/06_status/proof/UTV2-1533/verification.md's Commit SHA reference section). The PR's actual, live current head is validated externally -- by GitHub itself (`gh pr view <PR> --json headRefOid`) and by the SHA-bound executor-result/v1 comment posted after each push -- never self-recorded inside a commit belonging to the branch it describes.

scope.total_paths_count_note: Generated from git, not typed manually: `git diff --name-only origin/main..HEAD` after the control-plane commit lands. 14 implementation + 6 control-plane. file_scope_lock in the lane manifest declares all 14 implementation paths upfront (unlike the superseded lanes, which only declared 5 at start and needed a CODEOWNER scope-override for the rest) -- File Scope Lock should pass without any override on this clean lane.
scope.no_unrelated_files: Confirmed via `gh pr diff 1216 --name-only` and `gh pr view 1216 --json changedFiles` post-push -- see diff-summary.md for the captured output.

lane_maximizer_p2_fix.problem: lane-maximizer.ts's advisory dispatch-command suggestion defaulted a lane_type:"verification" candidate's --verification-target to the candidate's own issue_id, silently, whenever no explicit target was known. This was flagged as an open review finding on the superseded PR #1215 and deliberately deferred there (not fixed) pending this clean-PR pass.
lane_maximizer_p2_fix.fix: CandidateLane gains an optional verification_target field, sourced only from a narrow, explicit machine-readable line ('Verification target: UTV2-####') in queue/Linear intake text -- never inferred from title, branch, purpose text, or file paths. A verification candidate with no explicit target is blocked (MISSING_VERIFICATION_TARGET, never silently defaulted); a malformed one is blocked (MALFORMED_VERIFICATION_TARGET). Before recommending, the target is checked against active verification manifests (VERIFICATION_TARGET_ACTIVE if already claimed, VERIFICATION_TARGET_UNDETERMINED_CONFLICT if any active verification lane has no trustworthy target of its own -- fails closed) and against other candidates already planned in the same wave (VERIFICATION_TARGET_ALREADY_PLANNED). The dispatch command carries the exact supplied value through unchanged.
lane_maximizer_p2_fix.tests: 8 new tests in lane-maximizer.test.ts: explicit target passes through unchanged; missing target blocked; malformed target blocked; same active target blocked; different active target allowed; undetermined active target fails closed; two same-wave candidates for one target not both recommended; issue_id never silently substituted.
lane_maximizer_p2_fix.scope_note: The broader lane-maximizer planner-forecast gap (evaluateCandidates() not yet forecasting the complete active-plus-planned wave against all new type caps) remains tracked in the pre-existing UTV2-1535 follow-up -- that is a distinct, non-blocking planning-accuracy concern; ops:lane-start's checkConcurrencyLimits() is and remains the fail-closed mechanical authority regardless. This fix resolves the specific target-guessing bug, not UTV2-1535's broader scope.

codex_review_round_1.trigger: A fresh Codex review requested on this clean PR (2 passes: one on the original push, one re-triggered by an explicit '@codex review' comment after the rebase + control-plane commit) surfaced 4 findings, 2 of which were the same finding restated across the two passes.
codex_review_round_1.codex_dispatch_verification_target_defau: REAL, FIXED -- scripts/codex-dispatch.ts:517 (old) still had the exact same target-guessing bug this PR was created to fix, just in the real Codex execution path instead of lane-maximizer.ts's advisory suggestion: `laneType === 'verification' ? (explicitVerificationTarget ?? issueId) : undefined`. Fixed in commit c390bb60 -- a verification-lane dispatch with no --verification-target now throws before the lane is created; a supplied value is validated via requireVerificationTarget(). 2 duplicate review threads (one per Codex pass) replied to with file:line evidence and both resolved.
codex_review_round_1.lane_maximizer_broader_type_caps_DEFERRE: Same pre-existing gap as lane_maximizer_p2_fix.scope_note above -- the PM's own continuation directive explicitly carves this out as acceptable to remain in UTV2-1535. Replied on the thread explaining the deferral; left unresolved for PM visibility, not silently closed.
codex_review_round_1.agents_md_stale_limits_DEFERRED: REAL finding (AGENTS.md line 171 and .claude/commands/dispatch.md still state the old 2/4/6 limits), but fixing it would require touching files outside this PR's explicit, PM-declared 20-file scope boundary -- the exact boundary that exists specifically because an earlier version of this PR's ancestry let unrelated files creep in. Filed as a new, narrowly-scoped follow-up (UTV2-1536) instead of expanding this PR's scope. Replied on the thread explaining the deferral and citing the follow-up; left unresolved for PM visibility.
codex_review_round_1.net_result: 1 of 2 distinct real findings fixed with code + tests in this PR (the one specifically in this PR's own remit per the continuation directive); 2 of 2 distinct advisory/scope findings deferred with an explicit, honest reason and a real follow-up (UTV2-1535 pre-existing, UTV2-1536 new) rather than silently resolved or silently ignored.
